segments.speaker: 题目13/14
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. How's your job at the campus bookstore going? Pretty good. It was really hectic last week, which is no surprise because the semester is just starting. right? I actually avoided all that by ordering my books online. It was a smart move. Things have calmed down, thankfully. I think this actually might be my last semester at the bookstore, though. I heard that the tutoring center is looking for biology tutors. That's my major. So.
